title: Find My Device - Sending Tone - X button
scenario: Find My Device tone does not stop when tapping X button, user is not returned to map screen
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app with a headset paired and connected.
3. Tap Find My Device (allow GPS if prompted).
5. Tap the Play button to start the tone.
6. Tap "ok got it" on the prompt.
expected: Sound should stop and user is returned to the Find My Device map screen.
